practice.name: Problem 12 (2014 AIME I)
practice.statement: This is a 2014 AIME I problem focusing on orders and modular arithmetic. See the full problem statement on [AoPS](https://artofproblemsolving.com/wiki/index.php/2014_AIME_I_Problems/Problem_12).

practice.name: Problem 10 (2016 AIME II)
practice.statement: This is a 2016 AIME II problem focusing on Diophantine equations and Lifting the Exponent Lemma. See the full problem statement on [AoPS](https://artofproblemsolving.com/wiki/index.php/2016_AIME_II_Problems/Problem_10).
